items.title: Why JSON Feed?
items.content_html:
JSON Feed is a modern alternative to RSS and Atom, using JSON instead of XML.

It's easier to parse and more developer-friendly.
items.summary: An introduction to the JSON Feed specification

items.title: Parsing JSON in F# with FSharp.Data
items.content_html: The JSON type provider in FSharp.Data makes working with JSON data incredibly easy.
items.summary: How to use the JSON type provider

items.title: Building a Feed Validator
items.content_html: Learn how to validate RSS, Atom, and JSON Feed formats using functional programming techniques.
items.summary: A practical guide to feed validation
